title: veronica pimeleoides subsp. faucicola
intro: Veronica pimeleoides subsp. faucicola, also known as Faucol Veronica, is a subspecies of plant belonging to the Veronica genus, characterized by its small, fragrant flowers and hairy leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Veronica pimeleoides subsp. faucicola include its potential to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate headaches. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
